provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
CIVIL AVIATION (AIR TRANSPORT LICENSING)

[L.S.499.33

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 499.33
CIVIL AVIATION (AIR TRANSPORT LICENSING)
(FEES) REGULATIONS* *
5 ta’ Ottubru, 2004
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 429 tal-2004, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 411 tal2007 u bl-Att VIII tal-2010.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew imħassra bl-Att XL tal-2023.

1
